data.description: Basys.ai CEO Amber Nigam has been honored as one of the top Healthcare Technology CEOs of 2025. The announcement was made on 04-Mar-2026 by basys.ai. The company has issued a revised news release to provide updated information. Amber Nigam's recognition reflects her outstanding leadership in the healthcare technology sector. For more information, please refer to the original PR Newswire release dated 04-Mar-2026.

data.title: Earnings Breakdown: Canadian Natural Res Q4
data.description: Canadian Natural Resources announced its Q4 earnings on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 05:00 AM. The company exceeded estimated earnings by 11.32%, with an EPS of $0.59 compared to the estimated $0.53. Revenue saw a $122.00 million increase from the previous year. Looking back at past earnings, Canadian Natural Resources has consistently outperformed expectations. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Canadian Natural Res Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: The latest financial report for Canadian Natural Resources (NYSE: CNQ) was released on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 05:00 AM. In this quarter, the company exceeded estimated earnings by 11.32%, with an EPS of $0.59 compared to the estimated $0.53. Revenue also saw an increase of $122.00 million from the previous year. This positive performance in earnings indicates growth and strengthens investor confidence in the company's financial health. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

Some 10 rockets were launched from Lebanon at northern Israel a short while ago, the military says. According to the IDF, some of the rockets were intercepted while the others were allowed to hit open areas "according to protocol."

data.title: Vermiculus delivers VeriClear-based risk systems to OCC
data.description: In a recent development, Vermiculus, a global provider of clearing, trading, and CSD technology, successfully delivered two crucial microservice-based risk systems to The Options Clearing Corporation (OCC®) within a remarkably short timeframe. This delivery took place in Stockholm on March 5, 2026. The OCC® accepted these systems, signifying a significant step in enhancing their operations and risk management strategies. This achievement underscores Vermiculus' efficiency and reliability in implementing essential financial technology solutions.

data.title: BSV Now Listed on The Ramp Network
data.description: Today in Zug, Switzerland, the BSV Association revealed the successful addition of the BSV token to the Ramp Network, a prominent fiat-to-crypto on-ramp service. This advancement facilitates hassle-free and compliant conversion of fiat currency into BSV. The integration marks a significant milestone for BSV as it gains access to a wider audience through Ramp Network's global platform.
